title: crassula capitella subsp. sessilicymula
intro: Crassula capitella subsp. sessilicymula, also known as the mountain crassula, is a type of succulent plant that belongs to the Crassulaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Crassula capitella subsp. sessilicymula include reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms associated with respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea that can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
